strap: CCR Compound Semiconductors draws £811m of UKRI lead-led funding across 492 grants, anchored by Cardiff University (18%), with Office For National Statistics and Compound Semiconductor Applications Catapult on the industrial side. 10 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £81m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Extracting without reinvesting" and "Mediating instead of coupling" behaviour — extraction events absorb into intermediation institutions rather than triggering capital redirection or retention redesign across the ecosystem.
